title: OpenEMR Upgrade Guides
content:
Contents
1
Linux original source OpenEMR package
2
Windows original source OpenEMR package
3
Windows Pre-installed XAMPP OpenEMR Package
Upgrading OpenEMR needs to be done manually. The "Upgrading" section of the INSTALL file in the Documentation directory of OpenEMR outlines a strategy that should be used when upgrading OpenEMR. Also, as of version 3.1.0 OpenEMR is 100% UTF-8; read
HERE
if you are upgrading from a previous version, so as to see if it makes sense to also upgrade your mysql database to UTF-8.
